question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/StreamFileParser.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: parse(List<T>)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the fact that in parse(List<T>), doFlush() is only called once at the end on the last successfully parsed file, meaning that if an exception occurs after multiple files are doParsed() but before doFlush(), none of the parsed transactions are committed to the database?
